info.title: Admina API
info.description: Admina (by Money Forward) public API for managing organizations, users, identities, devices, services, spend tracking, and alerts for SaaS management.

get.description: Retrieve organization details.
Retrieve a list of users in the organization.
Get the number of users with admin role.
Retrieve a list of identities.
Check the identity management type configuration.
Retrieve identity statistics.
Retrieve an identity by ID.
Retrieve the history of an identity.

put.description: Toggle the archive flag on an identity.
Toggle the unregistered management flag on an identity.

post.description: Merge an identity with another in batch.

get.description: Retrieve the field configuration for an identity.
Get all custom fields for identities.
List all departments in the organization.
List all locations in the organization.
List all companies in the organization.
Get provisioning metadata for workspace accounts.
List all people in the organization.
Get a person by ID.

get.summary: List SaaS accounts for a person
get.description: List SaaS accounts associated with a person.
Return a list of devices with optional filtering.

post.description: Create a new history entry for a device.

get.description: Get all history entries for a device.
List all alerts for the organization.
List muted alert types.
Get spend data grouped by services.
Get spend data grouped by month.
Export spending data as CSV.
List all services in the organization.
Get engagement scores for services.
Get unused resources across services.
List SaaS accounts for a service.
Get files associated with a service.
List event log entries grouped by service.
List event log entries grouped by user.
List all event logs.
Export audit logs as CSV.
Get the count of audit log entries.

BearerAuth.description: API key passed as Bearer token
